description: A detainee card in ICE's standardized template. The right half shows a desaturated black-and-white close-up photograph of a Hispanic man (Adan Pablo-Ramirez) wearing a hooded jacket, photographed against a chain-link fence. The left half is a dark overlay carrying typography. At top, in large light-blue and cyan serif all-caps, the headline reads 'ARRESTED AND PENDING REMOVAL', followed by a white sans-serif subhead '1/22/2025 | Chicago, IL'. The name 'Adan Pablo-Ramirez' appears in large bold white sans-serif. Below, a 'CRIMES:' label with a bulleted list: 'Evasion from order of removal' and '2 DUI convictions'. The DHS and ICE seal and 'ICE' wordmark sit at lower left in white. A red diagonal banner across the lower-right corner reads 'CHICAGO FIELD OFFICE'.
notable_text: ARRESTED AND PENDING REMOVAL; 1/22/2025 | Chicago, IL; Adan Pablo-Ramirez; CRIMES: Evasion from order of removal, 2 DUI convictions; ICE; CHICAGO FIELD OFFICE
